mapper.select: SELECT d.*, u.name as manager_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN users u ON d.manager_id = u.id WHERE d.id = #{id}
SELECT d.*, u.name as manager_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN users u ON d.manager_id = u.id ORDER BY d.sort_order, d.id
SELECT d.*, u.name as manager_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN users u ON d.manager_id = u.id WHERE d.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY d.sort_order, d.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO departments (id, name, parent_id, manager_id, level, sort_order, status, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{parentId}, #{managerId}, #{level}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE departments SET manager_id = NULL WHERE manager_id = #{managerId}
